issues.description: Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' for Leader, but effect requires checking if Leader has 0 power or less. Should use a power/stat check condition, not board presence.
Target should be 'OpponentCharacter' with optional selection (up to 1), but current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' may not properly enforce the 'up to 1' limit.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text says 'during this turn'. Should be 'DuringYourTurn' to indicate the effect lasts for the remainder of your turn.
